### Post by Etanne on 2011-06-15
Hi everybody !

I'm comming here because I've problems with Ubuntu (x64) and my graphic card (Nvidia GT 335M).

When a I start my laptop I have a black screen.

I have try with these drivers : NVIDIA-Linux-x86_64-270.41.19 and NVIDIA-Linux-x86_64-275.09.07.

My xorg.config is :
```
# nvidia-xconfig: X configuration file generated by nvidia-xconfig

    Option         "ZAxisMapping" "4 5 6 7"

    Identifier     "Monitor0"

EndSection

Section "Device"

        ### Available Driver options are:-
        ### Values: <i>: integer, <f>: float, <bool>: "True"/"False",
        ### <string>: "String", <freq>: "<f> Hz/kHz/MHz",
        ### <percent>: "<f>%"

    Identifier     "Card0"

EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier     "Screen0"
    Device         "Card0"
    Monitor        "Monitor0"
    Option         "SLI" "Auto"
    SubSection     "Display"
        Viewport    0 0
```

Thanks :),
Florian
